claims.summary: The report combines historical semantic width with descriptive fingerprint width; current contracts keep them distinct.
claims.disposition: Verify 48D semantic transport, 32-slot fingerprint compatibility, and additive 12D interpretation separately.

claims.summary: A compact view must remain paired with canonical and residual evidence rather than becoming a restoration source.
claims.disposition: Verify companion-only, noninvertible, multi-scale context, and fallback-to-live-review boundaries.

claims.summary: Warmth, tail texture, and high-versus-low entropy distinctions already have explicit 12D regressions.
claims.disposition: Verify direct anchor, contextual anchor, distinguishability, fidelity, and flattened-glimpse tests.

claims.summary: PCA or another reduction can be compared offline against the deterministic map for retention and stability.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded fixture comparison with content hashes and no live transport change.

claims.summary: Replacing the deterministic map or changing semantic/fingerprint width would alter live codec or protocol contracts.
claims.disposition: Retain an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait before any live replacement.
